channel.title: INmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why Curaçao is the ultimate Caribbean getaway for your next island adventure
item.description: Steal my Curaçao itinerary to experience the best of what this Caribbean island has to offer.

item.title: Blizzard flight woes: More than 10,000 cancellations (and counting)
item.description: Flight schedules ground to a virtual halt across the region Monday as a major winter storm slammed the Northeast.
